summary: Ship a fast, approval-gated Aurous demo that turns shared project context into a useful Linear workspace.
goals: Prove context-to-Linear setup in one polished command.
Show every intended write before approval.
Persist exact Linear IDs, URLs, skips, and compatibility diagnostics.

milestones.name: Integration Ready
milestones.description: The deterministic plan, preview, MCP execution, and normalized result path work end to end.

milestones.name: Demo Ready
milestones.description: The live workspace and screen-recording flow are concise, convincing, and regression checked.

workstreams.name: Linear Integration
workstreams.label: Integration
workstreams.outcome: A deterministic, approval-gated path through the official Linear MCP.

workstreams.name: Demo Experience
workstreams.label: Demo
workstreams.outcome: A polished terminal narrative and a visually useful Linear project.

knownTasks.title: Lock the Linear demo contract
knownTasks.description: Define the exact supported project, label, milestone, issue, preview, approval, and result behavior.

knownTasks.title: Generate the deterministic Linear setup plan
knownTasks.description: Translate the structured launch context into explicit, dependency-ordered Linear actions.

knownTasks.title: Execute approved actions through the Linear MCP
knownTasks.description: Create only approved objects, using exact-target deduplication before every write.

knownTasks.title: Persist exact Linear IDs, URLs, and diagnostics
knownTasks.description: Normalize created and skipped objects into the Aurous run result with compatibility notes.

knownTasks.title: Run Linear E2E and Notion regression checks
knownTasks.description: Verify the real Linear path and confirm the existing Notion behavior remains unchanged.

knownTasks.title: Record the Build Week launch walkthrough
knownTasks.description: Capture the one-command preview, approval, write, and polished completion summary.

risks: A remote write may succeed before an interrupted agent returns its object ID.
A workspace-specific status or field may differ from the demo convention.
Repeated rehearsals could create duplicates without exact-target checks.
